1817120.name: Combat Troops VR
1817120.description:
Get ready for an immersive and adrenaline-pumping experience with Combat Troops VR.
This intense virtual reality game puts you in the shoes of a professional soldier, tasked with taking on a variety of challenging military missions.

Game Features


Levels:

10 maps (approx. 4 km²) including a tutorial and training map
4 difficulty levels
Both enemy and friendly bots

Weapons:

30 types of weapons (rifles, pistols, rocket launchers, grenades, mines)
Weapon skins
26 weapon accessories (sights, scopes, grips, silencers, lasers, etc.)
12 melee weapons

Character Customization:

7 types of uniforms
4 camouflage patterns
21 additional accessories
Over 25 other useful items

In Combat Troops VR, you'll have access to a wide variety of weapons to choose from, including assault rifles, machine guns, sniper rifles, and more.
Each weapon has its own unique features and capabilities, giving you the flexibility to choose the right one for each mission.

And with multiplayer mode currently in development, there's even more excitement to come.
Join our community of passionate gamers and experience the rush of combat like never before.

Immerse yourself in Combat Troops VR by selecting your character and uniform, and customizing your camouflage to reduce visibility. With full body control, you can swing and peek around corners, giving you the element of surprise and reducing the chance of being hit by the enemy. With a multitude of settings available, you can tailor your gaming experience to your preferences and make it truly your own. Choose your loadout, tweak your options, and get ready to take on the battlefield in style.



Experience the ultimate in weapon realism with Combat Troops VR. Handle, aim, and reload your weapons using real-life movements, just like a professional soldier. With a wide variety of short and long weapons to choose from, each with the ability to be modified, you can truly make each weapon your own. Add laser sights, silencers, or other attachments, and use a large selection of grenades, mines, explosives, bazookas, and much more to take down your enemies.

Customize your weapon attachments and change the skin to suit your environment, ensuring that you are always properly equipped for the mission at hand. Use smoke grenades for screening units or signaling, and if you run out of ammo, you can rely on quick reflexes and close combat skills to defeat enemies with a knife, axe, or other bladed weapons. With Combat Troops VR, you'll feel like a true soldier on the battlefield.



Combat Troops VR puts you in control of your inventory, allowing you to set up and store your items for easy access during combat. With a backpack that can be customized to your liking, you can ensure that you have everything you need at your fingertips. This includes first aid kits, ammunition, grenades, mines, masks, and a wide variety of other essential items that can make all the difference in the heat of battle. With Combat Troops VR, you'll always be prepared for whatever challenges come your way.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
